ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  "twitter_handle" TEXT /* Twitter handle of the author */,
  "facebook_handle" TEXT /* Facebook handle of the author */,
  "instagram_handle" TEXT /* Instagram handle of the author */,
  "linkedin_handle" TEXT /* LinkedIn handle of the author */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date the author was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the author was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_formats" (
  "post_format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the post format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the post format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "post_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post tag */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_analytics" (
  "post_analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the analytics are associated with */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "comments" INTEGER /* Number of comments the post has received */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date the analytics were created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the analytics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_analytics_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_comments" (
  "post_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is associated with */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "commented_on" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the like is associated with */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who liked the post */,
  "liked_on" TEXT /* Date the post was liked */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date the like was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the like was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_likes_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_categories" (
  "post_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post category */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)
